channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Is the moon too far for your data? IBM's Red Hat is teaming up with Axiom Space to send a data center into space
item.description: IBM’s Red Hat has teamed up with Axiom Space to send a data center to the International Space Station this spring.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Well, that's unexpected: Samsung will team up with its fiercest Chinese rival to produce next gen NAND flash
item.description: Samsung has signed an agreement with China’s YMTC to use its bonding technology in the production of 400-layer NAND flash memory.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: They were forced to scam others worldwide. Now thousands are detained on the Myanmar border
item.description: Thousands of sick, exhausted and terrified young men and women, from countries all over the world squat in rows, packed shoulder to shoulder, surgical masks covering their mouths and, some, their eyes.
item.dc:creator: Huizhong Wu, Jintamas Saksornchai And Martha Mendoza, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New delivery robot can haul 2,200 pounds of your stuff
item.description: WeRide's unmanned electric delivery van, the Robovan W5, has 194 cubic feet of cargo space and can carry payloads up to about 2,205 pounds
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ChatGPT remains the most popular AI tool in offices worldwide, survey finds, with India leading the way
item.description: ChatGPT remains the most widely used AI tool in workplaces, with India leading global adoption with a 92% usage rate.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft previews AI chat template for .NET
item.description: Microsoft is previewing a .NET web app template intended to enable quick development of AI-powered chat applications. Part of an ongoing effort to make AI development with .NET easier to discover and use, the AI Chat Web App template was announced March 6.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 16 hijacked browser extensions expose 3.2 million users
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy recommends deleting 16 browser extensions immediately in response to a report saying more than 3.2 million web users were affected by a security breach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: We asked the world’s most creative people how they’re using AI. This is what they said
item.description: How are the world’s most creative people using AI to drive their work forward? This was the question at the heart of an in-depth survey Fast Company recently conducted in partnership with Whalar Group, a global creator company.
item.dc:creator: Brendan Vaughan, Fast Company

item.title: Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride
item.description: This blog will focus on requirements in the context of the federal government. Sound requirements drive best value pricing and performance for customer agencies The post Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Roger Waldron, Federal News Network

item.title: i2CAT promueve el primer laboratorio abierto europeo de investigación 6G en órbita baja
item.description: El centro de investigación i2CAT ha anunciado en el marco del Mobile World Congress la puesta en marcha del primer laboratorio en órbita terrestre baja de Europa (LEO, por sus siglas en inglés).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: RIP (por fin) a la moda del blockchain
item.description: El bombo y platillo del blockchain que se produjo a finales de la década de 2010 casi ha desaparecido, sustituido por un intenso interés en la inteligencia artificial (IA) y perjudicado por los esquemas incompletos de criptomonedas y NFT, dicen algunos expertos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk’s Starlink could soon tap into $42 billion federal program
item.description: The Commerce Department has changed its rules in a way that could open the door for Starlink, Elon Musk’s satellite internet service, to become part of a federal $42 billion grant program to bring high-speed service to rural and poor areas of the United States.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: LibreOffice downloads on the rise as users look to avoid subscription costs
item.description: Interest in LibreOffice, the open-source alternative to Microsoft Office, is on the rise, with weekly downloads of its software package close to 1 million a week. That’s the highest download number since 2023.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Without being there, Apple hits Mobile World Congress
item.description: If you overlook the introduction of the iPhone 16e with its own Apple-designed 5G modem along with the release of new iPads, Macs and processors, you might argue that Apple didn’t make an impression at this year’s Mobile World Congress.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Microsoft’s Veeam partnership signals data resiliency market shift
item.description: Veeam recently announced a multi-faceted expansion of its partnership with Microsoft. The first facet is that Microsoft is making an equity investment in Veeam.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Asymmetric AI Warfare: The New Era of Cheap Intelligence
item.description: The White House has released a memorandum emphasizing the need for AI innovation and safety, highlighting the US government's efforts to stay ahead in this rapidly evolving field.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Judge denies Musk's move against OpenAI
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Top data storage certifications to sharpen your skills
item.description: Enterprise data storage skills are in demand, and that means storage certifications can be more valuable to organizations looking for people with those qualifications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: JDK 25 kicks off with a stable values API
item.description: While Java Development Kit 25 is not set to arrive until September, the first feature already has been proposed for it — a preview of a stable values API that promises to improve startup of Java applications. Stable values are objects that hold immutable data.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelley was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Casey Anthony, mom acquitted in toddler's death, joins TikTok
item.description: Casey Anthony, a Florida mother who was acquitted of murder charges in the death of her 2-year-old daughter Caylee, has joined TikTok to brand herself as a "legal advocate.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
